maintenanceMode.description: Set to true to show the maintenance screen and block app access. Flip back to false when done.

maintenanceTitle.description: Title shown on the maintenance screen.

defaultValue.value: GemSprout is currently undergoing maintenance. Please check back soon.

maintenanceMessage.description: Body text shown on the maintenance screen.

maintenanceButtonText.description: Button label on the maintenance screen. Leave maintenanceButtonUrl empty to just reload the app.

maintenanceButtonUrl.description: If set, the maintenance screen button opens this URL instead of reloading. Use for update prompts (e.g. TestFlight link).

betaMode.description: Set to false at App Store launch. Hides the beta welcome popup, TestFlight link in settings, and Dev Settings card.

appDownloadUrl.description: Download link shown during onboarding and in settings. Update to App Store URL at launch.

version.description: Add maintenanceButtonUrl for TestFlight update prompt
